title: Velvety British Napa Cabbage Bake
description: A creamy, savory bake that marries tender napa cabbage with a luscious yogurtcheddar sauce, finished with a golden breadcrumb crust.

ingredients.name: Napa cabbage
ingredients.notes: Remove the outer leaves and chop into bite‑sized pieces

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Use a sweet onion for a milder flavor

ingredients.name: Whole milk
ingredients.notes: Adds creaminess without the heavy fat of cream

ingredients.name: Breadcrumbs
ingredients.notes: To be toasted for a crisp top

instructions: Lightly oil a 9×13 inch baking dish.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and sauté the diced onion until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced napa cabbage to the skillet and cook, stirring frequently, until it just starts to wilt, about 3 minutes.
Transfer the cabbage–onion mixture to the prepared baking dish.
In a bowl, whisk together Greek yogurt, whole milk, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Pour the yogurt mixture evenly over the cabbage, then sprinkle the shredded cheddar on top.
Toss the breadcrumbs with a pinch of salt, toast them in a dry pan until golden, then scatter them over the cheese.
Bake uncovered for 25–30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and bubbling. Let rest 5 minutes before serving.
